heading: Yallingup vs Yallingup Siding — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yallingup, Western Australia and Yallingup Siding, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yallingup Siding has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Yallingup (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yallingup or Yallingup Siding safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yallingup has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Yallingup Siding scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yallingup scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Yallingup Siding scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yallingup or Yallingup Siding?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yallingup Siding has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
